title: hieracium sagittatum subsp. macellum
intro: Hieracium sagittatum subsp. macellum, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium sagittatum subsp. macellum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible antiviral and antibacterial properties. Hieracium sagittatum subsp. macellum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
